classObjective: Describe transformations of exponential functions verbally and in function notation.
workedExamples: 8-2, Example 1 — Describe Transformations from Equations (Vertical Shifts, Horizontal Shifts, Stretches, Compressions, Reflections)
warmUp: How does f(x - 2) compare to f(x)?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: vertical shifts, horizontal shifts, stretches, compressions, reflections of exponential functions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice describing transformations of exponential functions using function notation
independentPractice: Practice problems describing transformations of exponential functions verbally and in notation
assessment: Exit ticket: describe how y = 2^{x+3} - 1 relates to y = 2^x
capReflection: What is the effect of adding inside the exponent versus adding outside the function?
